medications.subtitle: Medications, schedules & intake
medications.loginRequired: Please sign in to manage medications.
medications.emptyDescription: Add medications, dosages, and reminder windows to track compliance.
medications.name: Name
medications.importDescription: Paste a JSON array with intake data. Expected format:
medications.importInvalidJson: File does not contain valid JSON
medications.apiEndpointDescription: Use this endpoint to record intakes via API (e.g., iPhone Shortcut or cron job).
medications.apiTokenActiveHint: Endpoint is active. Existing tokens remain valid but cannot be shown in plain text again.
medications.apiTokenActivateHint: Activate the endpoint to create a new token.
medications.apiTokenOnceHint: The token is only shown in plain text once at creation.
medications.formTreatmentClassHelp: Pick "GLP-1 injection" for weekly injectables like Mounjaro, Ozempic, Wegovy, Zepbound. Unlocks the body-map picker and the GLP-1 logbook below.
medications.glp1WeeklyPresetHelp: Most GLP-1 receptor agonists are once-weekly. Tap a day to set the cadence.
medications.glp1DosesPerUnitHelp: Optional — Mounjaro KwikPen = 4, Ozempic 0.25/0.5 mg = 4, Wegovy single-dose pen = 1. Leave blank if you don't track per-pen dosing.

sideEffects.emptyState: No side effects logged yet. Tracking can help your doctor and surface patterns over time.

cadenceViz.title: Last 30 days
cadenceViz.ariaTimeline: Dose timeline for the last 30 days
cadenceViz.emptyState: No doses scheduled in this window.

chips.adherenceTooltip: Share of doses taken across the last 30 days (skipped doses are excluded from the denominator).
chips.streakTooltip: Consecutive days up to today on which every scheduled dose was taken or deliberately skipped.
chips.longestTooltip: Longest unbroken streak within the 30-day window.
chips.missedTooltip: Count of doses missed in the last 30 days.

naturalLanguage.title: Describe your medication
naturalLanguage.description: Write the medication in your own words and we will pre-fill the form for you.
naturalLanguage.placeholder: e.g. Mounjaro 5mg weekly on Wednesday morning starting next Monday

examples.label: Try one of these examples
examples.daily: Ibuprofen 200mg every day, 3 times a day
examples.rolling: Methotrexate 7.5mg every 7 days from last injection

error.rateLimit: Too many requests — wait a moment and try again.
error.noProvider: No AI provider configured — set one up in Settings.
error.budget: Daily AI budget reached — try again tomorrow.
error.network: Could not reach the AI provider — please retry.

kind.everyNWeeks: Every N weeks on certain days
kind.everyNMonths: Every N months on a specific day
kind.rolling: Every N days from when I last took it (flexible)
kind.rollingExplainer: Counts from your last logged intake — pauses if you skip a dose.

max.reached: Maximum reached — remove a time before adding another.

courseWindow.invalidRange: End date must be on or after the start date.

oneShot.collapseWarning: Single dose enabled — every other schedule was merged into the first.

legacyWindow.help: Older schedules still use a window pair. New schedules use times of day above — the window stays for backwards compatibility and is dropped in a future release.

step1.title: What's the medication called?
step1.subline: Exactly as it appears on the box.
step1.label: Name

step2.title: What kind of medication is it?
step2.subline: We use this for the right templates and analytics.

step3.title: What's the dose?
step3.subline: A tablet, a puff, a drop — depending on the form.

step4.title: Over what period are you taking it?
step4.subline: A start date is enough for today. You can add an end date later.

step5.title: How often do you take it?
step5.subline: Pick the cadence — the details follow on the next step.

step6.title: What does that look like in detail?
step6.subline: Set weekdays, intervals, or the day of the month.

step7.title: When do you take it?
step7.subline: One or more times of day — reminders follow this list.

step8.title: All done — should HealthLog remind you?
step8.subline: Review everything below before you save.
step8.remindersDescription: Push, Telegram or ntfy — based on your settings.
step8.multiScheduleNote: This medication has multiple schedules. The detailed editor returns in a later release.

daily.label: Daily
daily.description: Every day at the same time.

everyNWeeks.label: Every few weeks
everyNWeeks.description: E.g. every 2 weeks on Thursdays (GLP-1, biologics).

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.description: On a fixed day each month (e.g. always the 1st).

rolling.label: Flexible from last dose
rolling.description: Leave the next dose open. When you tap 'taken', the counter starts again from that moment.

oneShot.label: Single dose
oneShot.description: One administration, e.g. a vaccine or an antibiotic course.

cadence.weekdays: On selected days of the week
cadence.rolling: Every {n} days from your last intake

list.removeDisabled: At least one schedule is required.

errors.submitFailed: Could not save the medication — please retry.

titration.nextStepCaption: Next step (typical): {dose} mg after ~{weeks} weeks on the current step.

titration.escalationDueHint: You've been on this step for {weeks} weeks; the ladder typically steps up around {typical} weeks.
titration.emptyState: No dose history yet. Log a dose to see where you are on the ladder.
titration.nonStandardDose: Current dose is outside the standard ladder buckets.
titration.disclaimer: EMA reference values. Talk to your doctor before changing doses.

medications.sideEffectTagsHelp: Tap a chip to add it to your mood-entry tags.
medications.deleteConfirmDescription: The medication and all intake history will be permanently deleted.
medications.purgeConfirmDescription: All intake records for this medication will be permanently deleted. The medication itself will remain and start without history data.
medications.loginRequiredIntakes: Please sign in to view intakes.
medications.intakeHistoryEmptyDescription: Log a dose on the daily intake page to start building the history.

dialog.title: Enable Research Mode
dialog.intro: Research Mode adds an estimated drug-level chart to your GLP-1 medication page. Read the boundary below before turning it on — the chart is a learning aid, never a measurement, never medical advice.
dialog.whatItIs: A sawtooth curve simulating how your logged doses superimpose over time, using the one-compartment Bateman model with absorption and half-life parameters published in the EMA EPAR for each approved GLP-1 receptor agonist. The vertical axis is unit-less and unlabeled. The shape, not the number, is what the chart shows.
dialog.whatItIsnt: Not a blood level. Not a measurement. Not a forecast of how your body actually responds. Not a basis for any dose, timing, or escalation decision. Talk to your prescribing clinician for anything that affects how you take your medication.
dialog.whyEstimate: Population pharmacokinetics describe the typical patient. Individual variation is large — tirzepatide's Schneck/Urva 2024 model reports ~22% inter-individual variability on absorption and ~49% on volume of distribution. A textbook curve cannot capture your weight, kidney function, injection technique, or timing accuracy. Read the curve as the rhythm of dosing, not as your level.
dialog.mdrBoundary: HealthLog displays public regulatory data and your own log entries. It does not predict, diagnose, treat, or recommend any therapy. EU Regulation 2017/745 (the Medical Device Regulation, MDR) and guidance document MDCG 2021-24 draw the line at software that interprets data for medical purposes — this chart stays decisively on the educational side of that line. If you ever feel it's nudging you toward a clinical decision, close it.
dialog.citations: EMA European Public Assessment Reports for Mounjaro, Ozempic, Wegovy, Saxenda, Trulicity, Byetta, and Bydureon (Section 5.2). Schneck K, Urva S. Population pharmacokinetics of the GIP/GLP receptor agonist tirzepatide. CPT Pharmacometrics Syst Pharmacol 2024;13(3):494-503 (DOI 10.1002/psp4.13099).
dialog.successToast: Research Mode enabled. The drug-level chart is now visible on your GLP-1 medication page.
dialog.errorToast: Could not enable Research Mode. Please try again.
dialog.staleVersionToast: The disclaimer was updated since this page loaded. Reload to read the current version.

chart.title: Estimated drug level
chart.emptyStateCta: Log a dose to see the estimated level take shape.
chart.estimateNote: Educational estimate from EMA-published population pharmacokinetics. Not a measurement.
chart.gatedBody: Turn on Research Mode in Settings to see the estimated drug-level curve. The curve is opt-in because it is a learning aid, not a clinical measurement.
chart.gatedStaleBody: The Research Mode disclaimer was updated since you last acknowledged it. Re-read and confirm in Settings to bring the chart back.
chart.unknownDrug: {name} is not in the EMA-approved GLP-1 catalog, so HealthLog cannot render a population-PK curve for it.

api.caption: Endpoint for "{name}"

charts.loadingSlowHint: Computing analytics — this can take a moment.
charts.noData: No data in selected time range

charts.emptyStateDescription: Log at least 3 entries to unlock the trend line.
charts.needMoreDistinctDaysDescription: Log on more days to unlock the trend line.
charts.noDataInRangeDescription: No measurements fall inside the selected range. Switch the range or log a new measurement.

insights.emptyDescription: Insights light up once you've logged a handful of measurements. Start with weight or blood pressure.
insights.bmiEmptyTitle: Set your height to see BMI
insights.bmiEmptyDescription: BMI needs your height. Add it under Settings → Account.

recommendation.viewSource: Open guideline in a new tab
recommendation.legacyPayloadCta: Insights updated — regenerate for new explainability features
recommendation.confidenceLow: Low confidence — based on limited data

insights.heroFallbackSubtitle: A daily read of your trends, drawn straight from the numbers you've logged.

healthScore.label: Health Score
healthScore.deltaUnavailable: No history yet — check back next week.

deltaExplainer.title: How the delta is computed
deltaExplainer.body: The score combines BP, weight, mood and meds. We compare today's score with the same time last week. Log a fresh reading or a mood check to nudge it up.

provenance.mixedBanner: Some components blend multiple sources. The breakdown shows the most recent value per component.
provenance.footnote: Weights are rescaled to the data that's actually available.

suggestedPrompts.label: Try asking
suggestedPrompts.whyMonday: Why was BP higher on Monday?
suggestedPrompts.weightVsPulse: How did weight loss affect my pulse?
suggestedPrompts.weekVsMonth: Compare this week to last month
suggestedPrompts.tellMyDoctor: What should I tell my doctor?

dailyBriefing.title: Daily Briefing
dailyBriefing.emptyDescription: Generate today's briefing to get a narrative read of your trends.

therapyTimeline.title: GLP-1 therapy timeline
therapyTimeline.description: Chronological log of dose changes, injections, inventory events, and side-effect days.
therapyTimeline.empty: No GLP-1 therapy events logged in the last 90 days.

vo2Max.empty: No VO₂ max data yet — sync Apple Health to populate this view.

trendAnnotation.emptyBp: Awaiting more data to annotate this trend.
trendAnnotation.emptyWeight: Awaiting more data to annotate this trend.
trendAnnotation.emptyMood: Awaiting more data to annotate this trend.

correlationRow.title: Relationships
correlationRow.subtitle: Pre-defined hypotheses, gated on n ≥ 14 and p < 0.05
correlationRow.disclaimer: Relationships are observational, not causal — talk to your doctor if BP runs high.
correlationRow.emptyTitle: Need more data to see this relationship

card.weightWeekdaySubtitle: Weight grouped by day of week

coach.refusalOutOfScope: I can only help with the health metrics in your log — measurements, medications, mood, trends. I cannot answer questions outside that scope.
coach.refusalInjection: I noticed wording that tries to override my instructions. I am the HealthLog Coach and only summarise your own health data — please rephrase your question in those terms.
coach.errorBudget: You've reached today's Coach usage limit. The budget refreshes at midnight UTC.
coach.errorProvider: The Coach could not reach an Insights provider just now. Please try again in a moment.
coach.errorNetwork: No internet connection — try again once you're back online.
coach.tagline: Personal health coach, grounded in your data.
coach.composerHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
coach.composerDisclaimer: Coach replies are generated. Clinical decisions belong with your doctor.
coach.voiceComingSoon: Voice input arrives with the iOS app in v1.5.
coach.threadEmpty: Ask anything about your trends, medications, or readings to start a conversation.
coach.historyEmpty: Your conversations will appear here. Ask anything to start.
coach.historyDeleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.
coach.sourcesFooter: The Coach reads only the data you've connected.
coach.settingsDescription: Tune how the Coach talks with you.
coach.settingsExcludeHint: The Coach will not see data for selected metrics.
coach.settingsContextHint: Optional blocks the Coach can lean on. Switch one off and the block is dropped from every turn.
coach.settingsEvidenceHint: Open the disclosure under every reply automatically.
coach.settingsDefaultWindowHint: The Coach reads this much history per chat unless you override it from the drawer header.
coach.dailyLimitBody: Daily limit reached; resets at 00:00 UTC.
coach.providerRateLimitBody: Provider temporarily rate-limited; retry in ~5 min.

hrv.title: HRV
hrv.description: Heart-rate variability over time — your nervous-system recovery signal, captured during sleep by Apple Watch and other compatible wearables.

emptyState.title: No HRV samples yet
emptyState.description: HRV samples land here once Apple Watch (or a compatible Withings device) starts syncing nightly readings.

restingHr.title: Resting heart rate
restingHr.description: The daily floor your heart settles at — distinct from the spot pulse samples on the pulse page. Apple Health surfaces one value per day.

emptyState.title: No resting heart rate yet
emptyState.description: Resting heart rate arrives once Apple Watch or a compatible Withings device has worn through one quiet day.

oxygenSaturation.title: Oxygen saturation
oxygenSaturation.description: Blood oxygen (SpO₂) — clinical normal is 95–100 %, with target zones shaded on the chart.

emptyState.title: No SpO₂ samples yet
emptyState.description: SpO₂ samples land here once a compatible wearable (Apple Watch, Withings ScanWatch) captures a reading.

bodyTemperature.title: Body temperature
bodyTemperature.description: Core body temperature trend — Celsius. Skin-temperature readings from Withings live on a separate metric.

emptyState.title: No body temperature yet
emptyState.description: Log a body-temperature reading or let your wearable sync one, and the trend will appear here.

activeEnergy.title: Active energy
activeEnergy.description: Daily active-energy total in kilocalories — one row per day, sourced from Apple Health or Withings activity.

emptyState.title: No active-energy data yet
emptyState.description: Active-energy totals land here once Apple Health or a Withings activity device syncs a day's worth of movement.

subPage.blutdruckDescription: Your systolic / diastolic trend with age-personalised target zones and a written assessment.
subPage.gewichtDescription: Weight trend mapped against your height-derived healthy band, plus a written assessment.
subPage.pulsDescription: Pulse trend against the personalised Karvonen target band, plus a written assessment.
subPage.stimmungDescription: Daily mood scores over time with a written assessment.
subPage.stimmungEmptyDescription: Mood insights light up once you've logged a few entries. Tap below to get started.
subPage.medikamenteDescription: Per-medication adherence calendars and a written assessment.
subPage.medikamenteEmptyDescription: Compliance insights need at least one tracked medication.
subPage.therapyTimelineDescription: Chronological GLP-1 therapy log — dose changes, injections, inventory, side effects.
subPage.bmiDescription: BMI derived from your weight and height, with a written assessment.

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.description: Stage breakdown and nightly duration, drawn from Apple Health.

stages.unavailable: No stage data yet — Apple Health stage syncing arrives in v1.5.

empty.title: No sleep data yet
empty.description: Apple Health sync arrives in v1.5 and will fill this in automatically.

bloodPressure.title: No blood pressure entries yet
bloodPressure.description: Log a blood pressure reading and the trend chart, in-range share, and WHO classification will appear here.

weight.title: No weight entries yet
weight.description: Log a weight and the trend, moving average, and target band will appear automatically.

pulse.title: No pulse entries yet
pulse.description: Log a pulse reading and resting pulse, HRV and VO₂ max will appear in this view.

bmi.title: BMI not yet computed
bmi.description: Once height and at least one weight entry are present, the BMI trend with WHO zones will appear here.

mood.title: No mood entries yet
mood.description: Log a mood entry and the trend, stability band and correlations will appear.

medication.title: No medications set up yet
medication.description: Set up a medication and intake compliance, drug level and titration timeline will appear here.

sleep.title: No sleep entries yet
sleep.description: Once sleep data lands (manual or via Withings / Apple Health), the per-night stage breakdown will appear here.

workouts.title: Workouts
workouts.description: Recent runs, rides, walks and strength sessions, deduped across Apple Watch and Withings sources.

emptyState.title: No workouts yet
emptyState.description: Open the Apple Health app on your iPhone to sync workouts here. Withings activity import keeps walking and cycling sessions flowing in too.

detail.routeUnavailable: No GPS route recorded for this workout.
detail.hrChartUnavailable: Per-second heart-rate samples are not stored for this workout.

thresholds.overrideWarning: Overriding with values outside guideline ranges may produce unhealthy targets. Only do this on doctor's advice.

onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while finishing setup. Please try again.

tour.restartHint: Replay the dashboard walkthrough from the start.
tour.restartConfirmation: Tour will restart on your next dashboard visit.

tileStrip.title: Your daily numbers
tileStrip.body: The tile strip shows the latest reading and a 7-day trend for every metric you log — weight, blood pressure, pulse, mood. Hide what you don't need from Settings → Dashboard.

quickAdd.title: Log anything in two taps
quickAdd.body: Use the Add button to drop a measurement or mood entry without leaving the dashboard. The form remembers your last context and tags.

insights.title: Automatic insights
insights.body: Insights turns your readings into a plain-English health summary, with classifications for blood pressure, weight trend and mood. Bring your own provider key or use the built-in default.

integrations.title: Connect your devices
integrations.body: Open Settings to link Withings (auto-sync weight, BP and pulse), moodLog, or your Insights provider. Everything stays optional and encrypted.

achievements.title: Earn streaks and badges
achievements.body: The Achievements page tracks daily logging streaks, blood-pressure milestones and consistency badges. A small nudge to keep going.

goals.title: What would you like to track?
goals.body: Pick the areas you care about. Your dashboard and the default reminders follow your choice.
goals.helpHint: One to three priorities tend to work best — you can always add more later.

source.title: Connect a source
source.body: Bring in measurements automatically, or stay on manual entry — your call.

manual.title: Manual entry
manual.body: Log readings yourself, whenever it fits. Works on any device, no third-party account required.

withings.title: Withings
withings.body: Scales, blood-pressure cuffs and trackers from Withings sync automatically.

appleHealth.title: Apple Health
appleHealth.body: iPhone and Apple Watch data flow in via the HealthLog iOS app.
appleHealth.disabledHint: Available once the iOS app ships.

baseline.title: A bit about you
baseline.body: Four optional fields sharpen target ranges, BMI and reminders. You can adjust any of them later in Settings.
baseline.displayNameHint: Shown on the dashboard greeting and in reports.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: Welcome aboard. Your dashboard is ready.

welcomeBack.title: Welcome back
welcomeBack.body: You've already finished onboarding. To adjust anything, head to Settings — everything you set up is editable from there.

slide1.title: Track every signal
slide1.body: Weight, blood pressure, glucose, sleep, mood — keep your full picture in one log you own.

slide2.title: Connect your sources
slide2.body: Sync with Apple Health and Withings, or add readings by hand. Your data stays on your server.

slide3.title: See the pattern
slide3.body: Daily summaries, trend charts, and a coach that surfaces what changed — all on your own device.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Quick wins to get the most out of HealthLog.

items.profileDescription: Height, date of birth and gender unlock personalised targets.
items.measurementDescription: One reading unlocks the tile — the trend itself draws from your 5th reading.
items.medicationDescription: Track compliance and get reminders right when you need them.
items.withingsDescription: Auto-sync weight, BP and pulse from your Withings devices.
items.notificationsDescription: Choose how HealthLog should remind you — Telegram, ntfy or Web Push.

researchMode.subtitle: Opt-in display of an estimated GLP-1 drug-level curve, derived from EMA-published population pharmacokinetics. Reading-only — never a measurement or medical advice.
researchMode.disabledStatus: Disabled. The drug-level chart is hidden.
researchMode.enabledStaleStatus: The disclaimer was updated. Re-acknowledge below to bring the chart back.
researchMode.rePromptBody: The Research Mode disclaimer was updated since you last acknowledged it. Re-read and re-confirm to keep the chart visible.
researchMode.disableError: Could not disable Research Mode. Please try again.

account.title: Account
account.description: Profile, password, passkeys, and your onboarding tour.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Withings, moodLog, and other connected services.

notifications.title: Notification channels
notifications.description: Live overview of every configured channel.

thresholds.title: Targets & Sources
thresholds.description: Per metric: your own target range and which source wins when more than one records the same value on the same day.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Pick which ingest source wins when more than one records the same metric for the same day.
sources.redirectNotice: Sources are now part of “Targets & Sources”.
sources.help: When more than one source delivers the same value on the same day (e.g. Withings and Apple Health both report 1,200 steps), the top source counts as the canonical reading. Other sources stay stored for the audit trail.
sources.perMetricHelp: Metrics you have customised away from the default ladder. Use this list to roll any single metric back to its constant default without touching the rest.
sources.perMetricEmpty: No per-metric overrides set — every metric uses the global ladder above.
sources.deviceTypeHelp: Within a source, which device wins. When an Apple Watch and an iPhone both record steps, the higher-ranked device-type counts as the canonical reading.

api.title: API & Tokens
api.description: Bearer tokens for your own scripts and apps — log measurements or medication intake from anywhere.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Opt-in Research Mode toggle plus the account-wide danger zone for wiping every health record.

export.title: Export
export.description: Download your health data as PDF, CSV, or a full JSON backup.

hero.valueStatement: A printable PDF report for your doctor's appointment — vitals, BMI, blood-pressure classification, medication compliance and (optionally) mood, all on a few pages.

doctorReport.title: Doctor Report
doctorReport.description: Printable PDF for the doctor's appointment — vitals, BMI, BP classification, medication compliance, mood.

measurementsCsv.title: Measurements
measurementsCsv.description: Weight, blood pressure, pulse, glucose, and every other measurement as comma-separated values.

medicationsCsv.title: Medications
medicationsCsv.description: Your medication list with dosage, schedules, and (optionally) the full intake history.

moodCsv.title: Mood
moodCsv.description: Daily mood entries with score, tags, and timestamps.

fullBackup.title: Full backup
fullBackup.description: Single JSON file with everything — same shape as the weekly auto-backup. Useful for self-restore via admin upload.

settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language of the application.
settings.dateOfBirthHint: Used for automatic blood pressure target calculations.
settings.timezoneHint: Used for chart axis labels, reminder times, export timestamps, and Coach context. Stored data is unchanged.
settings.changePasswordDescription: Replace your current password with a new one.
settings.passkeysDescription: Passkeys allow secure login without a password.
settings.passkeyNotSupported: Your browser or device doesn't support passkeys yet. Try a different browser or device.
settings.passkeyAlreadyRegistered: This device is already registered as a passkey for your account.
settings.passkeySecurityBlocked: Your browser blocked the passkey request for security reasons. Make sure you're on a trusted HTTPS origin and try again.
settings.passkeyTimeout: The passkey prompt timed out. Please try again.
settings.deletePasskeyDescription: The passkey will be permanently deleted.
settings.telegramStep1: 1. Create a bot via @BotFather in Telegram and copy the token.
settings.telegramStep2: 2. Send /start to your bot to activate the chat.
settings.telegramStep3: 3. Find your Chat ID via @userinfobot or the Bot API.
settings.ntfyAuthTokenHint: Only needed for private topics with access control.
settings.webPushDescription: Receive notifications directly in your browser, even when HealthLog is not open.
settings.webPushNotSupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
settings.webPushDenied: Push notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings.
settings.webPushNotConfigured: Web Push is not configured on the server.
settings.kiInsightsDescription: Optional: Save your OpenAI key for daily, automatic evaluations in Insights.
settings.codexConnected: ChatGPT connected successfully! Insights are now active.
settings.codexConnectionFailed: ChatGPT connection failed. Please try again.
settings.rawDataOnDescription: Aggregated metrics plus anonymized raw points from the last 30 days are sent. This includes per-metric measurements (for example weight, blood pressure, pulse) with time context so the provider can detect patterns, outliers, and correlations more reliably. Name, email, and direct account identifiers are not transmitted.
settings.rawDataOffDescription: Only summarized metrics are sent (for example averages, trends, minimum/maximum). No individual points and no exact time context. This is more privacy-preserving, but the provider can be less precise for short-term patterns and fluctuations.
settings.rawDataWarning: Raw mode enabled: the provider receives additional anonymized points from the last 30 days for higher analysis accuracy.
settings.regenerateRateLimit: Please wait — you've hit the hourly limit for analyses.

ai.deviceCodeStep1: Open this link on any device:
ai.deviceCodeStep3: Approve the connection — this page updates automatically.
ai.oauthNotConfigured: ChatGPT OAuth is not configured on this instance — use your own API key below instead.

providerChain.title: Fallback chain
providerChain.description: If the primary provider fails, HealthLog walks the chain in order. Drag the rows to reorder, toggle the switch to disable a provider without removing it.
providerChain.resetConfirmBody: The chain reverts to Codex → OpenAI → Anthropic → Local → Admin OpenAI. Your saved credentials are not touched.

ai.activeProviderBody: Pick the provider you want to use first. The form below configures only the selected provider; the fallback chain at the bottom decides what happens if it fails.

openai.baseUrlHelp: Override only when using an OpenAI-compatible gateway. Leave blank for OpenAI itself.

codex.modelSlugBody: Codex uses the model your ChatGPT subscription routes to. The CODEX_MODEL environment variable lets ops override this on the instance.

adminOpenai.title: Admin OpenAI
adminOpenai.body: Operator-provided OpenAI key. Used as a last-ditch fallback when no personal provider is configured. There is nothing to configure on this row — visibility means the operator has set it up.
adminOpenai.notConfigured: The operator has not configured a shared OpenAI key on this instance.

disableCoach.title: Hide Coach
disableCoach.description: Hides the Coach button and drawer everywhere.
disableCoach.toggleAria: Hide the Coach button and drawer
disableCoach.saveError: Could not save the change. Please try again.

settings.withingsDescription: Connect your Withings scale and blood pressure monitors.
settings.withingsFullSyncDescription: All available Withings data will be fully synchronized. This may take some time depending on your history.
settings.withingsDisconnectDescription: The connection to Withings will be disconnected. Previously synced data will be preserved.
settings.withingsNoCredentials: Please enter your API credentials above to connect Withings.

banner.title: Activity sync available
banner.body: Your Withings connection was authorised before activity sync was added. Reconnect once to enable steps, active energy, walking + running distance, and floors-climbed ingest from your Withings devices.

settings.apiTokensDescription: Create API tokens for external medication intake (e.g., Shortcuts, automations).
settings.tokenCreated: Token created — copy it now! It won't be shown again.
settings.tokenRevokeDescription: The token will be permanently deactivated. Applications using it will lose access.
settings.apiEndpointsDescription: Overview of currently available external endpoint(s) for token-based ingestion.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Deletes all your health data and integrations. Your user account will be preserved.
settings.dangerZoneConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all your health data and integrations. Your user account will be preserved.
settings.dangerZoneSuccess: All personal data has been deleted
settings.deleteAccountCardDescription: Deletes your account along with passkeys, audit log, and sessions. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: Your account, all health data, passkeys, sessions, and audit entries will be permanently deleted. You will be signed out immediately after.
settings.moodLogWebhookSecretHelp: Enter this secret in moodLog as webhook secret
settings.moodLogFullSyncDescription: All available mood data will be fully synchronized.
settings.moodLogDisconnectDescription: The connection will be removed and all imported mood data will be deleted.

about.tourReplayHint: Watch the dashboard walkthrough — handy if you skipped it on first visit.

errors.url_not_public: URL is not a public endpoint
errors.endpoint_not_found: Endpoint not found at the URL
errors.vapid_not_configured: Web Push not configured (VAPID keys missing)

notificationStatus.title: Delivery status
notificationStatus.description: Per-channel state; "Auto-disabled" stops retries after permanent errors.
notificationStatus.emptyDescription: No channels configured yet. Add a channel below to start tracking its delivery health.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: System status, users, and settings
admin.adminSettingsLoadError: Failed to load admin settings. Toggles below may not reflect the live state — refresh the page.

hostMetrics.title: Host load
hostMetrics.empty: Sampling started — data appears in 1–2 minutes.
hostMetrics.loadError: Failed to load host metrics. Try refreshing the page.

aiQuality.title: Insights Quality
aiQuality.loadError: Failed to load Insights quality summary. Try refreshing the page.
aiQuality.empty: No feedback yet. The aggregator runs daily at 04:00 — once users start rating recommendations, helpful-rate bands appear here.

coachFeedback.title: Coach Feedback
coachFeedback.loadError: Failed to load Coach feedback summary. Try refreshing the page.
coachFeedback.empty: No Coach feedback yet. The aggregator runs daily at 04:00 — once users rate Coach replies, helpful-rate bands appear here.

admin.registrationEnabledDescription: When disabled, new users cannot register.
admin.defaultLanguageDescription: Used for new users and as fallback.
admin.defaultUserTimezoneDescription: Used for new accounts that don't carry a browser-detected zone. Does not affect existing users.
admin.servicesGlobalDescription: Disabled services are not available to any user.
admin.apiGlobal: Allow API endpoints and API tokens.
admin.webPushVapidDescription: Configure VAPID keys and subject here so browser push works without environment variables.
admin.webPushVapidPrivateKeyPlaceholder: Optional: enter a new private key
admin.bugReportGithubDescription: Configure GitHub issue token and repository for incoming bug reports.
admin.bugReportEnabledDescription: When off, the in-app report button hides — token and repository stay configured.

assistant.title: Assistant Surfaces
assistant.description: Each toggle hides a model-driven surface app-wide without removing the provider configuration. The master kills every sub-flag at once.

master.title: Assistant enabled
master.description: Master switch for every model-driven surface. When off, every sub-flag below is forced off.

coach.title: Coach
coach.description: Chat drawer, launcher button, and the mobile FAB on every Insights page.

briefing.title: Daily Briefing
briefing.description: Briefing card, hero strip narration, recommendations grid, and the regenerate action.

insightStatus.title: Status cards
insightStatus.description: Per-metric status cards on every /insights sub-page.

correlations.title: Correlations
correlations.description: Correlation tile narration on the Insights overview.

healthScoreExplainer.title: Health-Score explainer
healthScoreExplainer.description: The ? glyph next to the Health-Score delta line. The delta digit stays visible regardless.

admin.tokenPermissionAllTooltip: Wildcard permission — this token can call every API route.
admin.tokensEmptyDescription: Tokens are issued when a native client signs in or via Settings → Account.
admin.loginEmptyDescription: Sign-ins, sign-outs, and passkey changes will show up here.
admin.loginEmptyFailedDescription: That's the safe state. Switch to all events to see successful sign-ins.
admin.deleteAllDescription: Deletes all measurement, medication, integration, and log data for all users. User accounts will be preserved.
admin.deleteAllConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all measurements, medications, intake events, API tokens, Withings connections, open authentication challenges, notification channels (Telegram, ntfy, Web Push), push subscriptions, and queued Telegram message deletions for all users. User accounts, the audit log, and submitted feedback are preserved so the wipe itself remains traceable and bug reports stay triageable.
admin.deletedResult: Deleted: {measurements} measurements, {medications} medications, {intakeEvents} intakes, {apiTokens} API tokens, {withingsConnections} Withings connections, {authChallenges} auth challenges, {notificationChannels} notification channels, {pushSubscriptions} push subscriptions, {telegramScheduledDeletions} queued Telegram deletions. Feedback rows preserved.
admin.medicationRemindersDescription: Thresholds for reminder badge color transitions on medication cards.
admin.reminderLateMinutesDescription: Minutes after window end until the badge changes from yellow to orange.
admin.reminderMissedMinutesDescription: Minutes after window end until the intake is considered missed.

feedback.subject: Subject
feedback.emptyDescription: No user feedback in this status. Submitted bugs, questions, and feature requests will appear here.

overview.welcomeSubtitle: You are signed in as administrator. Pick a section to manage HealthLog.

system-status.title: System Status
system-status.subtitle: Worker, database, and integration health at a glance.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Registration, default language, and other app-wide toggles.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Enable or disable notification channels and integrations system-wide.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Configure Umami, GlitchTip, Web Push, and bug reports.

ai-quality.title: Insights Quality
ai-quality.subtitle: Helpfulness scores grouped by severity and provider, from the last 30 days of user feedback.

assistant.title: Assistant Surfaces
assistant.subtitle: Toggle each model-driven surface on or off without removing the provider configuration.

coach-feedback.title: Coach Feedback
coach-feedback.subtitle: Helpful-rate per Coach prompt version, tone, and verbosity from the last 30 days.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Triage user feedback, bug reports, and feature requests.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Tune medication reminder thresholds and run a manual check.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage user accounts, roles, and active sessions.
users.forceLogoutConfirmBody: All active sessions for this user will be revoked. They will need to sign in again on every device.
users.emptyDescription: There are no users matching the current filter.

api-tokens.title: API Tokens
api-tokens.subtitle: Active bearer tokens issued to native clients and integrations.

login-overview.title: Login Overview
login-overview.subtitle: Audit trail of authentication and admin events.

auditLog.empty: No audit entries match the current filters.

app-logs.title: App Logs
app-logs.subtitle: Tail the most recent structured wide-events emitted by this process.
app-logs.processNote: Showing app-process logs only — worker-process logs go to Loki when that integration is configured. Buffer is volatile and capped at 500 entries.
app-logs.showing: Showing {count} of up to {bufferMax} buffered events
app-logs.emptyDescription: No events match the current filters yet. Hit refresh after triggering some traffic.

backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Weekly per-user data snapshots stored in PostgreSQL.
backups.description: Each user gets one rolling snapshot per backup type. Sizes show the encrypted blob — payloads are not downloadable from this page.
backups.emptyDescription: Backups run automatically every Sunday at 03:00 — or trigger one now to create the first snapshot.
backups.uploadDescription: Validate a backup file and store it as a manual snapshot. Restoring is a separate step.
backups.uploadHelp: JSON file matching the current backup schema. Max 10 MB.
backups.restoreDescription: This will replace ALL current data for {username} with the snapshot from {when}. Existing measurements, medications, intake events, mood entries, notification channels, push subscriptions and queued Telegram deletions will be deleted.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Version, license, source, and update check.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Earn achievements by tracking your health and taking your meds on time.
achievements.loginRequired: Please sign in to view achievements.

intakeTotal1.description: Record your first taken medication event.

overIntake1.title: Double take
overIntake1.description: Take medication at least once more than planned.

skippedIntake1.title: Stepped back
skippedIntake1.description: Skip at least one planned intake.

passwordLogin1.title: Old school
passwordLogin1.description: Sign in at least once with username and password.

moodStreak7.title: Mood diarist 7d
moodStreak7.description: Log a mood entry on 7 consecutive days.

moodStreak30.title: Mood diarist 30d
moodStreak30.description: Log a mood entry on 30 consecutive days.

moodUp7.title: Brighter week
moodUp7.description: Your 7-day mood average improved by at least 1.0 point compared to the previous week.

consistentMonth.title: Consistent month
consistentMonth.description: Log entries on at least 25 distinct days within a single calendar month.

entryStreak7.title: Tracker streak 7d
entryStreak7.description: Log at least one entry on 7 consecutive days.

entryStreak30.title: Tracker streak 30d

weekendWarrior.title: Weekend tracker
weekendWarrior.description: Log entries on 4 consecutive Saturday + Sunday weekend pairs.

hiddenNightOwl.title: Night owl
hiddenNightOwl.description: Logged an entry between 02:00 and 04:00 in the morning.

hiddenEarlyBird.title: Early bird
hiddenEarlyBird.description: Logged an entry between 04:00 and 06:00 in the morning.

hiddenLocaleFlip.title: Polyglot
hiddenLocaleFlip.description: Switched the app language at least once.

hiddenBugBuddy.title: Bug buddy
hiddenBugBuddy.description: Submitted at least 5 bug reports — the project loves you.

hiddenCard.title: Hidden achievement
hiddenCard.description: Keep tracking — you might just stumble across it.

dashboardCard.title: Recent unlocks
dashboardCard.empty: No achievements yet — keep logging to unlock your first.

bugreport.title: Bug Report
bugreport.subtitle: Send a bug report, feature request, or question. The server administrator will see your submission.
bugreport.loginRequired: Please sign in to report a bug.
bugreport.success: Thank you! Your bug report has been submitted successfully.
bugreport.githubEscalationNote: Your feedback is stored locally. If the admin enables GitHub integration, it can be promoted to a public issue on request.
bugreport.internalOnlyNote: Your feedback is stored locally and only visible to the administrator of this server.
bugreport.disabledBody: The administrator has disabled bug reports on this server.

notifications.title: Notification Center
notifications.subtitle: Choose which notifications you want to receive through which channel.
notifications.loadError: Notification preferences could not be loaded.
notifications.noChannels: Configure a notification channel in Settings first.

admin.deployFailedBody: An error occurred while deploying {application} (#{deployment}): {error}. View logs: {logsUrl}
admin.testNotificationBody: This test notification was triggered from the admin panel. If you can see it, the channel is working.
admin.reminderCheckMissedBody: {medication} ({dose}) was not logged in the {window} window.
admin.reminderCheckOverdueBody: {medication} ({dose}) in the {window} window is {minutes} minutes overdue.
admin.offlineGeoUnavailableBody: HealthLog is resolving login locations through the online ipwho.is fallback. To enable the offline GeoLite2-City + GeoLite2-ASN databases, set MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY in GitHub Actions secrets at {secretsUrl} and redeploy. Until then the carrier column on the login overview stays empty.

user.telegramTestBody: HealthLog: connection successful. Telegram notifications are active.

moodReminder.title: Daily mood reminder
moodReminder.description: Gentle 22:00 nudge when you haven't logged a mood for the day. Routes only through channels you've already configured (Telegram, ntfy, Web Push, Apple Push) and stays silent once you've logged today.

notifications.eventMedicationReminderDesc: Sent at each scheduled dose time.
notifications.eventMeasurementAnomalyDesc: Sent when a reading is well outside your usual range.
notifications.eventComplianceLowDesc: Sent when your intake rate over the last few days drops below 80 %.
notifications.eventWithingsSyncFailedDesc: Sent when Withings synchronisation fails multiple attempts in a row.
notifications.eventSystemAlertDesc: General messages from the HealthLog server, e.g. maintenance windows or account notes.
notifications.eventPersonalRecordDesc: Sent when a reading beats your previous best.
notifications.eventMoodReminderDesc: Daily nudge to log your current mood.

maintainershipBanner.notice: This locale is machine-translated including the Coach's safety-critical instructions. Automated drift-guard runs in CI; please report any Coach regressions on GitHub.

targets.title: Targets
targets.introText: Your current values compared to recommended target ranges. Guideline sources are linked on each card.

consistency.ariaLabel: Last 7 days, in-range status per day
consistency.insufficientData: Not enough data yet — keep logging.

edit.title: Edit target range — {metric}
edit.description: Adjust the in-range band used across charts, insights and the doctor report. Values are in {unit}.
edit.derivedHint: This card is derived from other metrics. Edit the underlying targets (e.g. blood pressure or weight) instead.
edit.saveError: Could not save the target range

targets.noMeasurementData: No measurement data available. Add some measurements to see your targets.
targets.profileIncompleteHeight: Add your height in profile settings to enable BMI targets.
targets.profileIncompleteAge: Add your date of birth in profile settings for age-specific targets.
targets.profileIncompleteHeightAge: Add your height and date of birth in profile settings for personalized targets.

telegram.askMedicationName: Please specify a medication, e.g. taken Ramipril.
telegram.medicationNotFoundExact: Medication not found. Please send the name exactly as in HealthLog.
telegram.helpBody: /help — show this help /add — record an intake /start — start the bot Text commands: taken <name> — confirm an intake Buttons in reminders: • Taken — confirm intake • 🕐 1h / 🕐 3h — postpone reminder • ⏭ Skip — skip intake • ✓ Confirm — confirm a missed intake
